windows.embed_text_v2: styled bubble bath scene with floating flameless LED tealight candles glowing, bath caddy holding votive plant and wine glass, cut to Dollar Tree shelf of packaged LED tealight candles, decor footage
windows.summary_v2: Lifestyle b-roll of a bubble bath lit with floating flameless LED candles and a styled bath caddy, ending on a store shelf of packaged LED tealight candles.

tags_v2.action: show flameless candles / bath decor and store shelf

seconds_v2.desc: Dim bathroom scene: a bubble-filled bathtub glows with several warm flameless tea-light candles floating among the foam; a black bath caddy at left holds a phone with a pink case.
Same tub of bubbles with floating LED candles casting amber light; a lit votive candle and the pink-cased phone sit on the wooden bath board at left, chrome faucet at lower frame.
Foamy bath water with multiple glowing battery candles scattered across the surface; caddy with phone and small votive remain at left near the tub faucet.
Camera pans across the bubbly bath; warm LED tea lights float in clusters on the foam, faucet and caddy edge visible.
Closer look at the chrome tub faucet and bubbles with glowing flameless candles behind; a white bath pillow rests against the far edge.
Wider view showing the jetted bathtub corner with white bath pillow, dual chrome faucet handles, foam and floating warm candles, caddy with votive at left.
Styled bath setup: black wood caddy spans the tub holding a potted plant, a lit pillar candle, and a glass of rosé wine, with the bubbly candle-lit tub behind.
Same staged scene from a slightly lower angle: plant, glowing votive, glass of wine and phone on the caddy across the bubble bath with floating LED candles.
Hard cut to a Dollar Tree store shelf displaying hanging packages of Luminessence 'LED Tealight Candles' (white flameless candles, 360 hour) on a pegboard.
